drills.name: Lower 1/3rd
drills.description: Focus on defense and ball control in the lower third, using nudging, shielding, and slap saves.

drills.name: Slowing the Ball
drills.description: Use drop catches, live catches, dead bounces, and micro flips to being as much control as possible to each shot.

drills.name: Shot Accuracy
drills.description: Pick a single important shot on the playfield; focus on flip timing and feeds that lead to making that shot.

drills.name: Feed Repetition
drills.description: Identify common feeds and skills that can be used to get control: post catch, Ostermeier, ski pass, loop pass, etc.

reminders: Find one thing on this machine that brings you joy.
As long as you have a ball, you have a chance.
